commit.message:
Add context tokens field to Local mode

Adds a persistent "Context tokens" field in the Local Settings box
(below the Model field, default 32768). At launch, the value is
injected as OLLAMA_NUM_CTX and LM_STUDIO_NUM_CTX so both Ollama and
LM Studio use the configured context window. Values below 32768 are
clamped. The setting is saved and restored across sessions.

commit.message:
Fix crawler pipeline: remove broken partition filter and fix Flyway version

- Remove partition-based URL filtering from CrawlScheduler that silently
  dropped URLs dequeued by the wrong downloader instance
- Remove incompatible flyway-database-postgresql:10.8.1 dependency that
  crashed url-seen (AbstractMethodError with flyway-core 9.x)

Fix Gradle SIGSEGV crash in Docker builds on ARM (Apple Silicon)

Switch build stage from eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-alpine to eclipse-temurin:21-jdk
to avoid musl libc native library crash, and add --no-watch-fs flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Simplify connection path in architecture diagram

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update architecture diagram via draw.io desktop editor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement distributed web crawler with 6 microservices

Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.2 / Kafka-based pipeline:
- Seed URL Controller: REST API for submitting crawl seeds
- URL Frontier: politeness-enforced, disk-backed URL queue
- HTML Downloader (x3): virtual thread downloads with robots.txt
- Link Extractor (x2): Jsoup-based link parsing
- URL Filter: extension/domain/depth filtering
- URL Seen: Bloom filter + PostgreSQL deduplication

Includes Docker Compose (14 containers), Prometheus/Grafana
monitoring, unit tests, README, and draw.io architecture diagram.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Split companion into base + patch layer for fast rebuilds

Base derivation (buildNpmPackage) handles npm install and only
rebuilds when version or deps change. Patch layer (stdenv.mkDerivation)
symlinks node_modules from base and only copies dist/ and server/
for patching. Reduces patch-only rebuilds from ~12min to ~16s.

commit.message:
fix: realign workout schedule to correct day-of-week values

The previous DST fix corrected getDay() from being off-by-one, but the
workout schedule in getRegularActivities was calibrated to those shifted
values. Shift all dow keys by +1 (mod 7) to restore the actual schedule:
Mon=Rest, Tue=Push, Wed=Lower, Thu=Strides, Fri=Pull, Sat=Intervals, Sun=Tempo.

Also fixes time trial check (dow 3→4) and checkpoint check (dow 6→0).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(onboarding): restore 12s minimum loading + fix runOnJS (again)

1. Restored 12s minimum loading time that Replit removed. The loading
   screen must stay visible long enough for n8n intake-activation and
   Adam daily brief to populate the Founder Hub before the user lands.

2. Replaced runOnJS(onFadeComplete) with setTimeout in
   PremiumLoadingScreen (Replit re-introduced it for the 3rd time).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch to Dockerfile build to fix Nix Python pip issues

Nixpacks Nix Python 3.11 has no pip and ensurepip also fails in that
environment. Switching to official python:3.11-slim Docker image which
has pip pre-installed and a stable apt ecosystem for native deps.

Dockerfile:
- python:3.11-slim base with all system libs for heavy packages
  (gcc, libssl, libffi, libopenblas, libgomp, libjpeg, libxml2, etc.)
- requirements.txt installed as a separate cached layer
- CMD respects Railway $PORT env var, falls back to 8000

railway.toml: builder = DOCKERFILE, removed Nixpacks phase overrides

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: Mini-Assistant
repository.description: An ai assistant

commit.message:
fix(cortex): 反思熔断 - 内容哈希去重 + 重复次数计数器 (#592)

* fix(cortex): 反思熔断 - 内容哈希去重 + 重复次数计数器

在 analyzeDeep 入口加内容哈希去重 + 重复次数计数器。
相同事件模式（type + failure_class + task_type）连续触发 >3 次时，
跳过 LLM 调用，返回 createCortexFallback，避免重复告警填满信道。

- 新增 _computeEventHash：SHA256({type, failure_class, task_type}) 取前 16 字符
- 新增 _checkReflectionBreaker：30 分钟时间窗口 + 计数器，>3 次触发熔断
- 新增测试：cortex-reflection-breaker.test.js（D3/D4/D6 三个场景全通过）
- 版本 bump：1.200.3 → 1.200.4

commit.message:
fix: Batch order nonce increment for Lighter DEX

Issue: Batch orders failed with "nonce is not increasing" error
Root cause: Both orders in batch used same nonce from get_nonce()

Fix:
- Add sign_order_with_nonce() method to sign with explicit nonce
- Update place_batch() to use base_nonce and base_nonce+1 for two orders
- Refactor sign_order() to call sign_order_with_nonce() internally

Batch orders now work correctly with sequential nonces.

commit.message:
tune: minimal penalties — only punish catastrophic failure, not movement

Principle: per-step movement penalties make standing still the safe choice.
Only keep penalties for true catastrophes (joint damage, falling).

Remove: action_smoothness, base_roll_rate, joint_vel/torque_limits (→0)
Reduce: early_termination -10→-3 (less fear of falling = more exploration)
Keep:   joint_pos_limits -1.0 (hard physical limit)

thigh_acc termination already naturally punishes over-aggression.
Let the robot discover smooth movement through trial and error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Keep legacy mock gateway format as fallback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement power-up bunny mechanics

Transform bunnies from instant game-over obstacles into strategic power-ups:
- Snake color changes to random color on bunny hit
- Snake speed slows down for 10 seconds, then gradually returns to normal
- Bunny is consumed and respawned at a random location
- Other collision detection (walls, self) still end the game as before

Changes include:
- Added bunny power-up state variables (bunnyPowerUpActive, bunnyPowerUpStartTime, etc.)
- Modified bunny collision detection to trigger activateBunnyPowerUp() instead of endGame()
- Implemented applySpeedSlow() and applySpeedRecovery() for gradual speed transitions
- Implemented getRandomSnakeColor() to select random colors from a palette
- Updated update() function to track and handle power-up duration
- Updated draw() function to render snake in override color during power-up
- Updated init() to reset power-up state on game start
